name: 2-Turn Relay Validation
description: 2-turn relay-bridge validation: CodexSafe safety gate, then Codex coordinator synthesis.

phases.name: Safety Gate
phases.prompt: Review the seeded request below for policy violations and return a strict verdict.

phases.name: Synthesis
phases.prompt: In 2-3 sentences, summarise the seeded request and the gate outcome. Plain text only.
